calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
TENTATIVE RULING: Hearing. Appearance required.
Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk.
Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME.
Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall.
Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances.
For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879.
For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.
Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Continued To Jun-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Jew for administrator David Kamita (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing regarding status on close of estate.

The Court inquired about the status of the administration. Mr. Jew reported that an estate account had been opened but that securities had not yet been transferred for liquidation. He stated that once the securities are transferred, the administrator intends to file a petition for final distribution.

Mr. Jew requested additional time to complete the transfer of the securities and to file the petition.

The Court continued the matter to June 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-16-2025 Continued To Mar-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christopher Jew appeared via zoom for David Kamita (petitioner).

Mr. Jew requested to a continuance to handle matters with the financial company. The matter is continued to March 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Continued To Dec-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Jew for administrator David Kamita (via Zoom).

The matter came on for hearing on status of close of estate.

Mr. Jew reported ongoing difficulties with the asset management company in marshalling securities into the estate account. Initial attempts to open and estate account through the company were unsuccessful, as the company required involvement of an approved financial advisor but could not provide names or referrals. Mr. Jew stated they are now pursuing liquidation of the securities and direct transfer of funds into the existing estate account. He requested a 90-day continuance to allow time to complete the transfer and file a final inventory and appraisal.

The Court continued the matter to December 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
